tweets.author: cryptohopper.bsky.social
tweets.text: MicroStrategy's situation highlights the risks of leveraged Bitcoin exposure. Their equity dilution creates a feedback loop - lower stock price means less capacity to buy more BTC via equity issuance. A cautionary tale for overconcentration.
